# 🐞 Bug Report

## 📋 Summary

Provide a brief description of the issue.

Example:
> The login page redirects back without authenticating the user.

---

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. Submit the form
5. Observe the issue

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

Example:
> The user should be redirected to the dashboard after successful login.

---

## ❌ Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

Example:
> The page refreshes and displays "Invalid Password" even with correct credentials.

---

## 📸 Screenshots (Optional)

Attach screenshots or screen recordings if applicable.

---

## 💻 Environment

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|
| Operating System | Windows / Linux / macOS |
| Browser | Chrome / Firefox / Edge |
| Browser Version | |
| Device | Desktop / Mobile |

---

## 📄 Error Logs (If Any)

Paste any console errors, terminal output, or server logs.

```text
Paste logs here...
```

---

## ✔️ Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this report.
- [ ] I have provided clear steps to reproduce the bug.
- [ ] I included screenshots or logs if available.
- [ ] I tested the latest version of the project.

---

## 📝 Additional Information

Add any additional context or information that might help diagnose the issue.
